auth_notes: Requires creating a project in Google Cloud Console, enabling the Google Drive API, configuring the OAuth consent screen, and generating Client ID/Secret. Scopes must be carefully selected (e.g., https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive).
rate_limits: 20,000 queries per 100 seconds per project; 1,000,000,000 queries per day. User-level limits also apply (approx. 10 queries per second per user).
gotchas: File IDs are required for most operations rather than file paths; users must often perform a 'List' or 'Search' first to retrieve the ID.
Shared Drives (formerly Team Drives) require the 'Supports All Drives' option to be enabled in API requests to see content.
Google's 'Restricted Scopes' policy may require a security audit if the application is made public, though this is bypassed for internal/personal n8n usage.
client_must_provide: OAuth2 Client ID and Client Secret
Specific Folder ID for target storage
research_notes: Google Drive is the primary n8n node for this category. While the node is simple to use, the initial GCP project setup is the most common hurdle for users. Webhook support is available via the 'Google Drive Trigger' node which utilizes Google's push notifications.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Google Drive is the primary n8n node for this category. While the node is simple to use, the initial GCP project setup is the most common hurdle for users. Webhook support is available via the 'Google Drive Trigger' node which utilizes Google's push notifications.
